comment.body: I find this totally weird, all these bear ETF trades after hours on Friday, largest ever trade in these three bear spy ETF's SDS,SPXS,SPXU 2X,3X,3X spy respectively and the 3rd largest in SH. In total $3/4 Bill on bear ETF, nothing at all in TQQQ,SPXL, UPRO etc (bull leverage ). Also largest ever trade in regional banks. Dont want to jump to conclusions but these things are not kind to longterm holders

comment.body:
UBS strategists note that these measures aim to lower Treasury yields and reduce the cost of U.S. debt servicing, in part by targeting foreign official holders of Treasuries.
Among the key elements are the potential withholding of interest payments and the issuance of ultra-long-dated or even perpetual bonds to selected foreign reserve holders.
